title: schoenus caespititius
intro: Schoenus caespititius, also known as the button grass, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schoenus caespititius include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its usage and availability may vary depending on the region and cultural context.
